title: How trusted education is empowering DIY investors
excerpt: Canadians are joining the do-it-yourself (DIY) revolution, and there has never been a better time to be a DIY investor, with wide access to discount brokerages and an expanding universe of educational resources.
author: Globe Content Studio

title: Build a better investing routine with these four steps
excerpt: The biggest barrier to investing isn’t always money, sometimes it’s a perception that the process is complex. But it doesn’t have to feel intimidating, says Caitlin Cormier, a senior client education instructor at TD Direct Investing.
author: Globe Content Studio
